incidents.title: Andy status check-in misclassified as work intake

summary.symptom: Andy status check-in misclassified as work intake
summary.suspected_cause: Andy frontdesk classified work-check-in phrasing ('are you doing any work?') as work_intake, generating a frontdesk request and model-aut...
summary.impact: User received contextually incorrect reply in andy-developer chat, reducing trust in frontdesk status behavior
summary.next_action: Deploy updated classifier/status filter and verify with live WhatsApp check-in phrases before resolve

notes.author: codex
notes.text: Added linkage-audit (stale/unlinked request detection) and pre-dispatch hard gate integration to reduce accidental work dispatch propagation from misclassified frontdesk traffic.

notes.author: codex
notes.text: Historical context restored: regression probe on 2026-03-04 for '@Andy are you doing any work?' did not reproduce misclassification (status-style reply, no andy_request rows, no worker runs in probe window).

notes.author: codex
notes.text: Historical context restored: targeted phrase probe at 2026-03-04T18:55:25Z returned status-style reply with no intake request and no matched worker run token.

incidents.title: Andy request linkage missing after successful dispatch

summary.symptom: Live Build App request created worker run and reached review_requested, but andy_requests.request_id=req-1772622326048-pprimary remained coordinator_active with empty worker_run_id.
summary.impact: User task flow stalls: intake/status replies succeed but no worker run is linked and task eventually fails with dispatch-block notice.
summary.next_action: Run scripts/test-andy-full-user-journey-e2e.ts against live runtime and confirm request_id -> worker_run_id linkage remains stable with zero new no_output_timeout artifacts in trace window.

evidence.debug_summary: Patched src/container-runner.ts to restore noOutput/idle config, add explicit timeout reason logging, and reset no-output watchdog on worker heartbeat lines; added regression coverage in src/container-runner.test.ts.

notes.author: operator
notes.text: Applied Apple-container patch in src/container-runtime.ts (runtime bin default container, health/list command adaptation, readonly mount adaptation) with passing typecheck/tests/build. Post-restart verification still blocked because app exits with FATAL 'No channels connected': src/channels/index.ts has no channel imports and src/channels contains only registry files in current workspace, so launchd service stays spawnscheduled.

notes.author: codex
notes.text: P0 prevention controls added: jarvis-pre-dispatch-gate (dispatch lint + stale-state gate), jarvis-auth-health, and completion contract lint routed via jarvis-ops to reduce no-output timeout/watchdog drift before dispatch.

notes.author: codex
notes.text: Historical context restored: 2026-03-05 root-cause isolation identified host no-output watchdog firing before final output when worker emitted heartbeat on stderr; prior fix path included container-runner watchdog reset on heartbeat and timeout-reason logging with regression test coverage.

incidents.title: Andy-Developer fails after restart with ERR_FS_CP_EINVAL in buildVolumeMounts

summary.symptom: Agent error: src and dest cannot be the same .../.claude/skills/.docs
summary.suspected_cause: skills sync attempted problematic symlink copies (.docs/self-path + symlink destination collisions) and Apple container runtime fails whe...
summary.impact: andy-developer agent failed to start containers and retried, causing no effective responses
summary.next_action: keep --user disabled for Apple container runtime and monitor live runs; address separate stale worker_runs record

notes.author: codex
notes.text: Workflow update: scripts/qmd-session-sync.sh now auto-runs qmd embed when qmd status reports pending vectors; mirrored in docs/workflow/session-recall.md.

notes.author: codex
notes.text: P0 tooling hardening shipped in scripts/jarvis-ops.sh with new auth-health, linkage-audit, completion-lint, and pre-dispatch-gate commands; these add deterministic guardrails and JSON evidence outputs for workflow governance.

notes.author: codex
notes.text: Historical context restored: post-fix runtime validation on pid 16298 showed andy-developer spawned container, produced output, and sent message; remaining reliability issue at that point was stale run userflow-1772654367569-bsprb (jarvis-worker-1, 2026-03-04).

incidents.title: Andy full-journey E2E script ack parser drift

summary.symptom: scripts/test-andy-full-user-journey-e2e.ts failed at intake-ack detection even though live dispatch succeeded and worker run reached review_requested.
summary.suspected_cause: E2E parser matched legacy 'Tracking this as' text while andy-developer emits conversational ack.
summary.impact: False-negative E2E failures can mask true runtime health and reduce confidence in regression gate.
summary.next_action: None; ack matcher updated to match current conversational text.

evidence.debug_summary: PASS: ack matcher now matches 'coordinating this with Jarvis'/'Got it'; request_id sourced from DB row

notes.author: codex
notes.text: reported: scripts/test-andy-full-user-journey-e2e.ts failed at intake-ack detection even though live dispatch succeeded and worker run reached review_requested.

notes.author: codex
notes.text: Parser mismatch detail: script currently expects intake text containing Tracking this as req-<id>; live andy-developer response was conversational ('Got it. I\'m coordinating this with Jarvis now') followed by dispatch confirmation. Worker run userflow-1772622324403-vd1vh reached review_requested at 2026-03-04T11:07:14Z.

notes.author: claude-code
notes.text: Fix applied: ack matcher updated to match 'coordinating this with Jarvis'/'Got it'. Removed extractRequestIdFromAck; request_id now sourced from DB andy_requests row. Happiness gate PASS confirms live ack path works.

resolution.summary: E2E ack matcher updated to match current conversational ack text; request_id sourced from DB row.
resolution.verification: happiness-gate PASS with greeting/status/progress latency under 1s; build + 500 tests PASS

incidents.title: format:check fails due existing src formatting drift

summary.impact: CI format gate cannot pass until files are normalized
summary.next_action: None; all 18 files formatted and format:check passes clean.

notes.author: user
notes.text: reported: npm run format:check reports style issues across multiple src/*.ts files

notes.author: claude-code

resolution.summary: All 18 src files formatted with Prettier; format:check gate passes.
resolution.verification: npm run format:check exits 0 with 'All matched files use Prettier code style!'

summary.symptom: Hooks and subagent surfaces can drift; built-in-first usage is not hard-enforced.

incidents.title: jarvis-acceptance-gate mktemp template incompatible on macOS

summary.symptom: scripts/workflow/verify.sh failed on acceptance-gate with mktemp File exists during build log capture
summary.suspected_cause: mktemp template included suffix after XXXXXX causing collision/compatibility issues on macOS
summary.impact: deterministic verify wrapper could fail before reporting real gate results
summary.next_action: keep mktemp template suffix-free and monitor wrapper runs for recurrence

notes.author: operator
notes.text: reported: scripts/workflow/verify.sh failed on acceptance-gate with mktemp File exists during build log capture

notes.author: operator
notes.text: Applied fix in scripts/jarvis-acceptance-gate.sh: mktemp template now /tmp/jarvis-acceptance-<check>.XXXXXX. Re-ran scripts/workflow/verify.sh --skip-tests --skip-connectivity: PASS.

resolution.summary: Acceptance gate mktemp template compatibility issue corrected and no recurrence in live acceptance runs.
resolution.confirmed_by_user: incidents which came out passed can be marked resolved
resolution.verification: Acceptance gate executed successfully after mktemp template correction; no mktemp collision errors observed

incidents.title: verify-worker-connectivity preflight false-negative during transient launchd/container status window

summary.symptom: verify-worker-connectivity preflight false-negative during transient launchd/container status window
summary.suspected_cause: preflight check in verify-worker-connectivity intermittently observes launchd/container status as down while standalone preflight passes...
summary.impact: verify-worker-connectivity returns FAIL despite successful worker probe and stale-state gates, creating noisy reliability signal
summary.next_action: stabilize service/runtime health sampling in verify prechecks or split hard-gate and advisory precheck modes

notes.author: operator
notes.text: 2026-03-03 mitigation applied: verify-worker-connectivity preflight changed to advisory; functional gates (probe dispatch + lane evidence + stale-state) remain hard-fail. Command now returns PASS with WARN preflight in transient windows.

notes.author: operator
notes.text: 2026-03-03 deterministic gate update: preflight now uses launchctl print state checks, prints concrete failure detail, and verify-worker-connectivity hard-fails preflight before probe to avoid mixed signals. Added permission-block hint when container checks fail with Operation not permitted in restricted contexts.

notes.author: operator
notes.text: 2026-03-03 follow-up: preflight stale-queue check now distinguishes non-probe vs probe runs. Non-probe stale queue remains hard-fail; stale probe backlog is warning, preventing diagnostics deadlock while preserving signal.

resolution.summary: Transient preflight false-negative no longer reproducing in live out-of-sandbox validation.
resolution.confirmed_by_user: incidents which came out passed can be marked resolved
resolution.verification: verify-worker-connectivity PASS with preflight PASS and probe PASS on 2026-03-04

incidents.title: jarvis-worker-1 probe failed_contract due completion branch mismatch

summary.symptom: jarvis-worker-1 probe failed_contract due completion branch mismatch
summary.suspected_cause: worker completion contract drift: first completion block used stale branch, causing branch mismatch validation
summary.impact: verify-worker-connectivity can fail even when worker runtime is healthy; creates false-negative reliability signal for mission gate
summary.next_action: tighten worker probe completion validation/retry path so stale first completion blocks do not leave failed_contract terminal state

notes.author: operator
notes.text: 2026-03-03: fixed completion parser to prefer latest valid <completion> block (src/dispatch-validator.ts). Added regression test in src/jarvis-worker-dispatch.test.ts. Focused probe run probe-jarvis-worker-1-1772523711-18103 PASS review_requested.

notes.author: operator
notes.text: 2026-03-03 post-fix validation: verify-worker-connectivity --skip-prechecks PASS with jarvis-worker-1 review_requested (probe-jarvis-worker-1-1772523843-18433) and jarvis-worker-2 review_requested (probe-jarvis-worker-2-1772523906-6470).

notes.author: operator
notes.text: 2026-03-03 status confirms one dispatch-block artifact exists (request_id validation mismatch on probe run); branch/contract validation noise still impacts connectivity signal.

resolution.summary: Completion contract branch mismatch no longer reproduced in live probe and live userflow dispatch.
resolution.confirmed_by_user: incidents which came out passed can be marked resolved
resolution.verification: Recent probe and userflow runs reached review_requested with accepted completion contract and zero dispatch blocks

incidents.title: Andy greeting delayed after hi due to no-output run

summary.symptom: Andy greeting delayed after hi due to no-output run
summary.impact: User pings in Andy-Developer can be consumed without timely reply; perceived responsiveness is poor and trust in lane health degrades.
summary.next_action: Add a fast-path greeting handler for simple salutations in andy-developer before heavy workflow logic, and add watchdog handling that aborts/stops no-output Andy runs earlier with immediate fallback reply.

notes.author: operator
notes.text: 2026-03-03 verification: happiness-gate still failing; script/test-andy-user-e2e.ts reports Simple Greeting latency 15963ms (limit 8000ms). Natural status text path also still emits req-tracking responses in chat history.

notes.author: operator
notes.text: 2026-03-03: post-fix happiness-gate PASS (greeting/status/progress latency <1s) with conversational frontdesk replies; keep open until manual User POV runbook + explicit user confirmation.

notes.author: operator
notes.text: 2026-03-03 watch/log check still shows no-output and stale probe watchdog patterns; andy responsiveness risk remains open pending fast-path greeting and watchdog behavior hardening.

resolution.summary: Andy user-facing responsiveness recovered for greeting/status/progress path.
resolution.confirmed_by_user: incidents which came out passed can be marked resolved

incidents.title: Workers not connected; Andy developer cannot restart workers; push task blocked

summary.symptom: Workers are not connected and I don't have access to restart them. To restart the push task: start worker containers manually via deployment system, then I will dispatch push task. Alternative: push branches manually from local environment.
summary.impact: Valid worker output can be produced after auto-fail, but DB status remains failed because failed->review_requested transition is blocked; Andy reports workers disconnected and re-dispatch loops
summary.next_action: Implement watchdog guard for in-flight worker processing/repair handoff and optionally track no-container elapsed separately; then re-run probe + real multi-step dispatch and confirm no invalid transition logs

notes.author: operator
notes.text: 2026-03-03 implementation validation: applied terminal-is-final race fix (no ungated completion fallback), probe watchdog moved to env-backed 180s with verify guard 240s. After daemon restart (pid 88861), verify-worker-connectivity still FAILS but reason shifted from stale_probe_run_watchdog to worker_execution_timeout (container no_output_timeout after 115000ms) for probe runs probe-jarvis-worker-1-1772561978-20667 and probe-jarvis-worker-2-1772562102-29270. No new 'falling back to ungated completion' or invalid completion transition logs for these runs.

notes.author: codex
notes.text: 2026-03-04 optimization workflow run: acceptance-gate failed at worker_connectivity (exit 127). Evidence: data/diagnostics/acceptance/acceptance-20260304T093428Z.json. Failure detail shows bash compatibility issue: mapfile command not found in scripts/jarvis-worker-probe.sh:83 and scripts/jarvis-verify-worker-connectivity.sh:152.

notes.author: codex
notes.text: 2026-03-04 fix applied: replaced mapfile usage in worker probe/connectivity scripts for bash 3 compatibility. Acceptance gate PASS with evidence data/diagnostics/acceptance/acceptance-20260304T105215Z.json (run outside sandbox to avoid permission artifacts).

resolution.summary: Worker connectivity gate stabilized; live probe + acceptance gate now pass with review_requested terminals.
resolution.confirmed_by_user: incidents which came out passed can be marked resolved
